title: Configuration Run Schema Create Request
description: Create request for the Configuration Run Schema resource. Omits server-generated fields (id) from `required` — the backend generates ids/timestamps server-side and ignores a client-supplied value. additionalProperties:true so a client MAY still send a server field without rejection.

ExperimentParameters.description: Parameters specific to this configuration run

model_parameters_id.description: Reference to the model parameters configuration

ExperimentParameters.x-traigent-note: generator_config_id and evaluator_config_id are optional for TraiGent SDK trials which use model_parameters_id instead

MeasureResults.description: Results from measure evaluations. Keys must be valid Python identifiers, values must be numeric or null. Maximum 50 keys per result.

^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*$.description: Score for a specific measure (numeric values only)

ExampleMetrics.description: Metrics for a single example evaluation. Separates identification from metric values.

metrics.description: Numeric measure scores for this example

NormalizationRange.description: Observed min/max range used to normalize one objective.

MultiObjectiveAnalysis.description: SDK-computed multi-objective scoring details carried through summary_stats.

weighted_score.description: Weighted aggregate score after objective normalization

objective_weights.description: Objective name to user-supplied relative weight

normalization_ranges.description: Objective name to observed normalization range

analysis_timestamp.description: Timestamp when the SDK computed this analysis

SummaryStats.description: Aggregated run metrics, including objective-aware weighted scoring metadata.

weighted_score.description: Weighted aggregate score after objective normalization

id.description: Unique identifier for this configuration run instance

experiment_run_id.description: Reference to the parent experiment run

experiment_parameters.description: Configuration parameters specific to this run

measures.description: Results from measure evaluations for this configuration. Each item contains example_id and metrics.

summary_stats.description: Aggregated metrics and optional multi-objective analysis for this configuration run

weighted_score.description: SDK-computed aggregate score for the configured objectives, exposed as a top-level field for sorting and display

status.description: Current execution status of the configuration run

error_message.description: Detailed error message if the run failed

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this configuration run was created

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the configuration run execution started

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the configuration run execution completed

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification to this configuration run

metadata.description: Additional metadata about the configuration run

tags.description: Tags for categorizing and filtering configuration runs

strategy_preset.description: Optional advisory strategy preset metadata recorded for this configuration run.

notes.description: Additional notes about this configuration run

workflow_metadata.description: Multi-agent workflow metadata including cost tracking and execution details
